title: psychotria pulgarensis
intro: Psychotria pulgarensis is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, commonly known as the Madagascar king of love or Love in the Mist. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Psychotria pulgarensis include reducing fever, relieving cough and respiratory issues, and treating various skin conditions. Herbal preparations of Psychotria pulgarensis include teas, infusions, and tinctures, often used in traditional medicine in Madagascar and other parts of the world.
